case_title: ROSA RODRIGUEZ VS. GEAR UP COMMUNICATIONS INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED ON FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ROSA RODRIGUEZ LOPEZ, RAUL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-07-2018 CONTINUED TO APR-04-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT GEAR UP COMMUNICATIONS' UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION APPEARANCE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF SHALL BE PRESENTED FOR HER DEPOSITION WITHIN ONE WEEK OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO APPEAR FOR HER DEPOSITION WITHIN ONE WEEK OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER, SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,234.20 SHALL BE DUE AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HER COUNSEL WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312 VIA EMAIL TO PCATALANOTTI@FMGLAW.COM JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATANLANOTTI, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Alternatively To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Written Discovery And Production Of Documents Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GEAR UP COMMUNICATIONS INC.'s Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Alternatively To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Written Discovery And Production Of Documents Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Defendant's motion for terminating sanctions and alternatively to compel plaintiffs responses to written discovery and production of documents request for monetary sanctions is unopposed and granted to the extent plaintiff shall respond to Supplemental Interrogatories and Supplemental Request for Document within twenty days of service of this order with notice of entry. Monetary sanctions in the sum of $610.00 is awarded to defendant to be paid within the aforesaid twenty days. Noted is the action is set for a dismissal hearing in Department 610 at 10:30 am today. If the action is dismissed today this order is moot.

Moving party to submit proposed order tracking the tentative ruling via email to sbs@sbslawsf.com

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition Appearance
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GEAR UP COMMUNICATIONS INC.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition Appearance:

Defendant Gear Up Communications' unopposed Motion to Compel Plaintiff's Deposition Appearance is GRANTED. Plaintiff shall be presented for her deposition within one week of notice of entry of this order. If plaintiff fails to appear for her deposition within one week of notice of entry of this order, sanctions in the amount of $2,234.20 shall be due against plaintiff and her counsel within two weeks of notice of entry of this order.

Defendant to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to pcatalanotti@fmglaw.com

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catanlanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
